## What and why

Describe what this changes and the reason for it. Link any related issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --workspace` is warning-free
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes (added a test for any fix or feature)
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` applied
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes
- [ ] Kept it keyless and local (no account, API key, or backend; only public metadata leaves the machine)
